name: Finger Soccer : Footbal Game
description: Play an exciting 2D finger soccer game with smooth drag-and-flick controls! Score amazing goals, challenge friends in 2-player mode, and compete in tournaments to become a football legend. Features Simple and addictive drag controls 2 Player offline matches World Cup and Career modes Penalty shootouts and crazy game modes Character customization Smooth physics and satisfying goals Play anytime, even offline Train your skills, build your dream team, and enjoy fast-paced football game
